  1. io.bloviate.gen

Uses of Package
io.bloviate.gen

Packages that use io.bloviate.gen
Package
Description
io.bloviate.datafaker
 
io.bloviate.db
 
io.bloviate.ext
 
io.bloviate.file
 
io.bloviate.gen
 
io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
 
  • Classes in io.bloviate.gen used by io.bloviate.datafaker
    Class
    Description
    AbstractDataGenerator
    Abstract base class providing common functionality for data generators.
    DataGenerator
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
    IndexedDataGenerator
    A DataGenerator whose value for a row is a deterministic function of that row's absolute (0-based) index, so it can be positioned to any row without replaying every preceding generate() call.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.gen used by io.bloviate.db
    Class
    Description
    DataGenerator
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.gen used by io.bloviate.ext
    Class
    Description
    DataGenerator
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.gen used by io.bloviate.file
    Class
    Description
    DataGenerator
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.gen used by io.bloviate.gen
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBuilder
    Abstract base class for data generator builders.
    AbstractDataGenerator
    Abstract base class providing common functionality for data generators.
    BigDecimalGenerator
    Generates BigDecimal values sized to a column's declared precision and scale using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    BigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for BigDecimalGenerator.
    BitGenerator
    Generates a single bit as an Integer that is either 0 or 1, chosen uniformly using the seeded random source (so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence).
    BitStringGenerator
    Generates a string of '0' and '1' characters for SQL BIT / VARBIT columns, e.g.
    BitStringGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for BitStringGenerator.
    BooleanGenerator
    Generator for Boolean values.
    Builder
    Builder interface for creating data generator instances.
    ByteGenerator
    Generates an array of random Bytes using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    ByteGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for ByteGenerator.
    CharacterGenerator
    Generates a single lowercase ASCII letter ('a' through 'z') chosen uniformly using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    ChildCardinality
    Deterministic mapping from a parent row's global (row-major) index to the number of child rows it owns, drawn from the inclusive range [minChildren, maxChildren].
    ChildCountGenerator
    Emits a parent table's "number of children" column under variable parent-child cardinality: for the k-th row (0-based) it returns cardinality.count(k) (for example TPC-C's o_ol_cnt).
    ChildCountGenerator.Builder
    Builder for ChildCountGenerator.
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator
    Emits one component of a child table's composite key when each parent has a variable number of children (see ChildCardinality), which the fixed-cardinality CompositeKeyComponentGenerator cannot express.
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    Builder for ChildKeyComponentGenerator.
    CidrGenerator
    Generates IPv4 CIDR network specifications of the form a.b.c.0/24.
    CompositeKeyComponentGenerator
    Generates one component (dimension) of a row-ordered cartesian product, which is what is needed to populate composite primary/foreign keys densely and without collisions.
    CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    Builder for CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.
    CurrentSqlTimestampGenerator
    Generates the current timestamp at the moment of generation.
    DataGenerator
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
    DateGenerator
    Generates random Date values drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    DateGenerator.Builder
    Builder for DateGenerator instances.
    DoubleGenerator
    Generates double values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    DoubleGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for DoubleGenerator.
    FloatGenerator
    Generates float values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    FloatGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for FloatGenerator.
    GroupedPermutationGenerator
    Emits a deterministic random permutation of [start, start + groupSize) within each consecutive run of groupSize rows, advancing to a fresh permutation for the next group.
    GroupedPermutationGenerator.Builder
    Builder for GroupedPermutationGenerator.
    GroupedPrefixGenerator
    Populates a column only for the first prefixSize rows of each consecutive group of groupSize rows, emitting null for the remainder.
    GroupedPrefixGenerator.Builder
    Builder for GroupedPrefixGenerator.
    IndexedDataGenerator
    A DataGenerator whose value for a row is a deterministic function of that row's absolute (0-based) index, so it can be positioned to any row without replaying every preceding generate() call.
    InetGenerator
    Generates IPv4 host addresses as a dotted-quad String, e.g.
    InstantGenerator
    Generates random Instant values drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    InstantGenerator.Builder
    Builder for InstantGenerator instances.
    IntegerArrayGenerator
    Generates a fixed-length Integer[] whose elements are unbounded random int values, bound to JDBC arrays of SQL type INTEGER.
    IntegerArrayGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for IntegerArrayGenerator.
    IntegerGenerator
    Generates int values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    IntegerGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for IntegerGenerator.
    IntervalGenerator
    Generates time spans as a String in PostgreSQL interval input form, years-months days hours:minutes:seconds, e.g.
    JsonbGenerator
    Generator for JSON / JSONB columns.
    JsonbGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for JsonbGenerator.
    LongGenerator
    Generates long values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    LongGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for LongGenerator.
    MacAddressGenerator
    Generates MAC addresses as colon-separated hex octets, e.g.
    MacAddressGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for MacAddressGenerator.
    NormalDoubleGenerator
    Generates double values from a normal (Gaussian) distribution with the configured mean and standard deviation, clamped to the inclusive range [min, max].
    NormalDoubleGenerator.Builder
    Builds a NormalDoubleGenerator, defaulting to a standard normal distribution (mean 0, standard deviation 1) with effectively unbounded min/max.
    NormalIntegerGenerator
    Generates int values from a normal (Gaussian) distribution with the configured mean and standard deviation, rounded to the nearest integer and clamped to the inclusive range [min, max].
    NormalIntegerGenerator.Builder
    Builds a NormalIntegerGenerator, defaulting to a standard normal distribution (mean 0, standard deviation 1) spanning the full int range.
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator
    Generates a BigDecimal drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) and rounded (HALF_UP) to a fixed scale.
    ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.
    SequentialIntegerGenerator
    Generates a monotonically increasing sequence of integers over the inclusive range [startInclusive, endInclusive], wrapping back to the start after the end is emitted.
    SequentialIntegerGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for SequentialIntegerGenerator.
    ShortGenerator
    Generates short values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    ShortGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for ShortGenerator.
    SimpleStringGenerator
    Generates fixed-length random strings.
    SimpleStringGenerator.Builder
    Builder for SimpleStringGenerator instances.
    SkewedTimestampGenerator
    Generates Timestamp values in the window [start, end] skewed toward end — i.e.
    SkewedTimestampGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for SkewedTimestampGenerator.
    SqlBlobGenerator
    Generator for SQL BLOB (binary large object) columns.
    SqlClobGenerator
    Generator for SQL CLOB (character large object) columns.
    SqlDateGenerator
    Generates random Date values for binding to JDBC DATE columns, drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    SqlDateGenerator.Builder
    Builder for SqlDateGenerator instances.
    SqlStructGenerator
    Generator for SQL STRUCT (structured / user-defined type) columns.
    SqlTimeGenerator
    Generates random Time values for binding to JDBC TIME columns, drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    SqlTimeGenerator.Builder
    Builder for SqlTimeGenerator instances.
    SqlTimestampGenerator
    Generates random Timestamp values for binding to JDBC TIMESTAMP columns, drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    SqlTimestampGenerator.Builder
    Builder for SqlTimestampGenerator instances.
    StaticBigDecimalGenerator
    Always generates the same configured BigDecimal value.
    StaticBigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for StaticBigDecimalGenerator.
    StaticDoubleGenerator
    Always generates the same configured double value.
    StaticDoubleGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for StaticDoubleGenerator.
    StaticFloatGenerator
    Always generates the same configured float value.
    StaticFloatGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for StaticFloatGenerator.
    StaticIntegerGenerator
    Always generates the same configured integer value.
    StaticIntegerGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for StaticIntegerGenerator.
    StaticStringGenerator
    Always generates the same configured string value.
    StaticStringGenerator.Builder
    Builder for StaticStringGenerator instances.
    StringArrayGenerator
    Generates a fixed-length String[] whose elements are random alphabetic strings, bound to JDBC arrays of SQL type VARCHAR.
    StringArrayGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for StringArrayGenerator.
    UUIDGenerator
    Generator for UUID (Universally Unique Identifier) values.
    VariableStringGenerator
    Generates strings whose length varies randomly within an inclusive [minLength, maxLength] range.
    VariableStringGenerator.Builder
    Builder for VariableStringGenerator instances.
    WeightedCategoricalGenerator
    Draws from a fixed set of values according to per-value weights — a categorical distribution.
    WeightedCategoricalGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for WeightedCategoricalGenerator.
    XmlGenerator
    Generates small well-formed XML documents, e.g.
    ZipfianIntegerGenerator
    Generates integers from a Zipfian (power-law) distribution over size consecutive values starting at start: rank k (1-based) has probability proportional to 1 / k^exponent, so the lowest values are by far the most frequent and the tail is long and thin.
    ZipfianIntegerGenerator.Builder
    Fluent builder for ZipfianIntegerGenerator.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.gen used by io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBuilder
    Abstract base class for data generator builders.
    AbstractDataGenerator
    Abstract base class providing common functionality for data generators.
    Builder
    Builder interface for creating data generator instances.
    ChildCardinality
    Deterministic mapping from a parent row's global (row-major) index to the number of child rows it owns, drawn from the inclusive range [minChildren, maxChildren].
    DataGenerator
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
    IndexedDataGenerator
    A DataGenerator whose value for a row is a deterministic function of that row's absolute (0-based) index, so it can be positioned to any row without replaying every preceding generate() call.
